query_normalized: developing new methods to synthesize high-performance membranes using sustainable materials chemistry
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) and (b) as it presents a specific sustainable material chemistry method (catalytic ring-opening polymerization of limonene oxide) to synthesize a bio-based polymer, which serves as a foundational component or additive for developing high-performance biodegradable materials like membranes. While it focuses on PLA blends rather than membranes explicitly, it provides the canonical prior work on the synthesis and property modification of sustainable polymeric mater
